description: At the end of a competitive game season, an agent must distribute rewards to players based on their final rank.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the final leaderboard for the completed season.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of all players and their final ranks.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific rewards (e.g., skins, titles) for each rank tier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the reward table for the season.

nodes.task_description: Run a script to grant the appropriate rewards to all eligible players based on their rank.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully executes the script to distribute all rewards.
